episodes.title: Derelict
episodes.description: The Anabasis crew picks up a distress signal from a ship that disappeared 40 years ago.

episodes.title: The Sleepers
episodes.description: Six life pods are still active aboard the derelict — but the occupants aren't quite human anymore.

episodes.title: Drift Current
episodes.description: A gravitational anomaly pulls the Anabasis off course, toward an unmapped system.

episodes.title: First Contact
episodes.description: A signal from the anomaly resolves into language — someone is trying to communicate.

episodes.title: The Cartographer
episodes.description: One of the sleepers awakens with knowledge of space routes that shouldn't exist yet.

episodes.title: Fault Lines
episodes.description: The crew fractures over whether to trust the Cartographer — as resources begin to run out.

episodes.title: Event Horizon
episodes.description: The Anabasis reaches the threshold of something vast, dark, and patient.

episodes.title: Into the Black
episodes.description: A cliffhanger season finale — the crew votes on whether to cross the threshold.

episodes.title: Through
episodes.description: The Anabasis emerges on the other side — and nothing is as expected.

episodes.title: Tessellation
episodes.description: Strange geometry governs this region of space, bending physics in unpredictable ways.

episodes.title: Echoes
episodes.description: Crew members begin experiencing memories that don't belong to them.

episodes.title: The Archive
episodes.description: A vast alien data structure allows the Cartographer to translate history spanning millennia.

episodes.title: Threshold Keepers
episodes.description: The entities that built the threshold make first contact — on their own terms.

episodes.title: Negotiation
episodes.description: The crew must offer something of genuine value to pass freely through Keeper space.

episodes.title: Sacrifice Play
episodes.description: One crew member volunteers to stay behind to satisfy the Keepers' terms.

episodes.title: Heading Home
episodes.description: The long journey back begins — but the crew is not the same as when they left.

extras.title: Building the Anabasis
extras.description: Production design team walks through the ship set construction.

extras.title: The Cartographer's Map
extras.description: An interactive breakdown of the Stellar Drift universe's star chart.

extras.title: Season 3 Teaser
extras.description: A brief glimpse of what awaits the crew on the return journey.
